title: Sex, Love, Misery: New New York
original_title: Sex, Love, Misery: New New York
overview: Swiping. Dating. Ghosting. Have you wondered what was really going on in your date's head? "Sex, Love, Misery" reveals candid thoughts and encounters between diverse singles looking to mingle or marry, from initial texts to hook ups and beyond.
